Note: Note 1: The Baro readings seem to be in cm of HG. I copied the original values in the last
column of this spreadsheet, and I converted those values to inches, which are in the
normal Baro column. All Baro readings from the Event area belong to the last hour
of the watch. I.e For watch 4-8 Wind Calm Weather bcq. Baro 77.3, the Baro reading is logged
in Hour 8. Unlike the weather data in the Event area, this is consistent with other ships of this type.
Note 2: It seems, from various patterns of weather data in the log, that the weather in the Event
area belongs to the second hour of the watch. For example for watch 4-8 the line of data
like Winds calm weather bcq belong in Hour 5. Other logs of this type indicate those data
belong to Hour 4. For this voyage, I have put Event weather in the odd hours, i.e. Hour 5,
not the even hours like Hour 4.
